creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
You have to take your artsy friends to @kulturehousedubai! 💕

It’s a vibrant cafe with a concept store and mini art gallery. Food selection is diverse; from shakshouka to stuffed shell pasta! Vibe is quirky yet relaxed. Definitely a good spot to chill out and appreciate creative works. 

Who will you bring here? Tag them in the comments. 🤗

👗 coords from @hemsandhampers
